name: Cloud Service Type Taxonomy
description: A hierarchical taxonomy for classifying cloud-native service types in modern distributed systems, covering deployment models, runtime environments, and management tiers.

children.name: Containerized Services
children.description: Services packaged and run in containers

children.name: Microservice
children.description: Small, independently deployable service with a single responsibility
children.value:
runtime: container
scaling: horizontal
orchestration: kubernetes

children.name: Sidecar
children.description: Auxiliary container that extends the primary service

children.name: Serverless Functions
children.description: Event-driven functions with no server management

children.name: HTTP Function
children.description: Function triggered by HTTP requests

children.name: Event Function
children.description: Function triggered by event bus messages

nodes.name: Data Services
nodes.description: Services that provide data storage and retrieval

children.name: Relational Database
children.description: ACID-compliant relational database service

children.name: Document Store
children.description: NoSQL document-oriented database

children.name: Message Broker
children.description: Asynchronous message routing and queuing service

name: HTTP Status Code Schema
description: A machine-readable schema defining standard HTTP response status codes, their categories, and semantic meanings for use in API documentation and error handling.

children.name: 200 OK
children.description: The request has succeeded

children.name: 201 Created
children.description: The request has been fulfilled and a new resource has been created

children.name: 204 No Content
children.description: The server has fulfilled the request but does not need to return a body

children.name: 400 Bad Request
children.description: The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax

children.name: 401 Unauthorized
children.description: Authentication is required and has failed or not been provided

children.name: 404 Not Found
children.description: The requested resource could not be found

children.name: 500 Internal Server Error
children.description: The server encountered an unexpected condition

name: Domain Event Ontology
description: An ontology defining the structure and relationships of domain events in an event-driven architecture, including event types, payloads, routing, and lifecycle states.

nodes.name: DomainEvent
nodes.description: Base concept for all domain events in the system

children.name: eventId
children.description: Unique identifier for this event instance

children.name: occurredAt
children.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the event occurred

children.name: aggregateId
children.description: ID of the aggregate root that emitted the event

children.name: CommandEvent
children.description: Event expressing intent to perform an action

children.name: correlationId
children.description: Links this command to its originating request

children.name: FactEvent
children.description: Event recording that something has happened (immutable fact)

children.name: version
children.description: Sequence version of this event for the aggregate
